translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i00.counter_total.help: Editable cumulative value for I00 in counter mode. This correction immediately overwrites the current counter total, becomes the new long-term statistic, and is written to NVS immediately.

translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i00.edge_mode.help: Edge to count for I00 en mode counter (0=falling, 1=rising, 2=both).

translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i00.i00_active_high.hel: Si active, input I00 is considered active in high state.
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i00.i00_c0.help: Multiplier coefficient applied to pulse count de I00 in counter mode. Converts raw pulses to published cumulative value. Formula: value = c0 * pulses.

translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i00.i00_name.help: Readable name de input digitale I00.

translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.binding_port.label: Physical port I02
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.counter_total.help: Editable cumulative value for I02 in counter mode. This correction immediately overwrites the current counter total, becomes the new long-term statistic, and is written to NVS immediately.
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.counter_total.label: Counter total
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.edge_mode.help: Edge to count for I02 en mode counter (0=falling, 1=rising, 2=both).
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.edge_mode.label: Mode de front I02
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_active_high.hel: Si active, input I02 is considered active in high state.
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_c0.help: Multiplier coefficient applied to pulse count de I02 in counter mode. Converts raw pulses to published cumulative value. Formula: value = c0 * pulses.
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_c0.label: C0 Coefficient I02
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_name.help: Readable name de input digitale I02.
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_name.label: Input name I02
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_prec.help: Nombre de decimales conservees for value calculee de I02 in counter mode.
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_prec.label: Precision I02
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_pull_mode.help: Mode de resistance interne applique a input I02.
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i02.i02_pull_mode.label: Pull input I02
translations.cfgdocs.io.input.i03.binding_port.help: Identifier of physical port used by digital input I03. Value references an allowed compile-time binding, not a raw GPIO number.
